permission.name: Manage Organization Settings
permission.description: Can update organization profile, settings, and configuration

permission.name: Manage Organization Members
permission.description: Can invite, remove, and update roles of organization members

permission.name: View Organization Analytics
permission.description: Can view organization statistics and reports

permission.name: Manage Events
permission.description: Can create, edit, and delete events

permission.name: Participate in Events
permission.description: Can register and participate in events

permission.name: Manage Participants
permission.description: Can manage event participants and registrations

permission.name: View Participant Data
permission.description: Can view participant information and statistics
